response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identify song metadata: "快眠!安眠!スヤリスト生活" (Good sleep! Sound sleep! Suyarist life) from on-screen text. Performer is Shirogane Noel.
2. Search for the song lyrics: Used query "快眠！安眠！スヤリスト生活 lyrics" and found the full lyrics on Lyrical Nonsense.
3. Scene mapping: Identified performance segments (00:00-01:54, 04:54-05:01) and talk segment (01:54-04:54).
4. Construct JSON: Populated fields with metadata and lyrics, ensuring correct formatting and escaping.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D performance of 'Kaimin! Anmin! Suyarist Seikatsu' by Shirogane Noel, followed by a birthday greeting talk, and a final performance segment with Shirogane Noel and Shiranui Flare.

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel performs the song 'Kaimin! Anmin! Suyarist Seikatsu'.
scenes.song_title: 快眠!安眠!スヤリスト生活
scenes.original_artist: スヤリス姫 (CV: 水瀬いのり)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
目指せよ快眠
勝ち取れ安眠
いざ夢の世界へ
理想の眠りを求めて
さあ始めよう
(ノンレム睡眠レム睡眠)
私は囚われの姫
魔王の城の中で
独り閉じ込められては
毎日ひたすらに眠ってます
今宵も
布団に入り
栖夜スヤリスト生活
枕もシーツも
硬くて眠れない
(君も寝具にしてやろうか!)
目指せよ快眠
勝ち取れ安眠
いざ夢の世界へ
ふかふかの枕手に入れて
この疲れ癒したい
恐れず前進
ほぐせよ全身
瞼を閉じたなら
すべすべのシーツの上で
さあ始めよう
(ノンレム睡眠レム睡眠)
私は囚われの姫
悲鳴が響く夜に
一人で檻を抜け出し
今日もお散歩へと
行ってきます
幾多の試練を越えて
新たな寝具の元へ
マグマで、猛毒で
死んでも眠りたい
(城ごと寝具にしてやろうか!)
掴めよ快眠
疲れて安眠
いざ夢の向こうへ
ハイテク目覚まし手に入れて
気持ちよく目覚めたい
まだまだ前進
華麗に変身
ごはんを食べたなら
魔法のベッドにダイブして
さあ始めよう
明日はもっと
今日よりずっと
いい夢みれるかな
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Aim for a good sleep
Win a sound sleep
Now, to the dream world
Seeking the ideal sleep
Now, let's start
(Non-REM sleep, REM sleep)
I am the captive princess
Inside the Demon King's castle
Locked up alone
I sleep earnestly every day
Tonight as well
Entering the futon
Suyalist life
Both the pillow and sheets
Are too hard, I can't sleep
(Shall I turn you into bedding too!)
Aim for a good sleep
Win a sound sleep
Now, to the dream world
Getting a fluffy pillow
I want to heal this tiredness
Moving forward without fear
Relaxing my whole body
If I close my eyelids
On the smooth sheets
Now, let's start
(Non-REM sleep, REM sleep)
I am the captive princess
On a night when screams echo
Escaping the cage alone
Today, for a walk again
I'm off
Overcoming many trials
Towards new bedding
With magma, with deadly poison
I want to sleep even if I die
(Shall I turn the whole castle into bedding!)
Grab a good sleep
Tired, a sound sleep
Now, to the other side of the dream
Getting a high-tech alarm clock
I want to wake up feeling good
Still moving forward
Transforming beautifully
If I have eaten a meal
Diving into a magic bed
Now, let's start
Tomorrow, more
Than today, by far
I wonder if I can have a good dream

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel talks about the performance and her birthday.
Shirogane Noel and Shiranui Flare perform the final part of 'Kaimin! Anmin! Suyarist Seikatsu'.
